$comment: Wire shape of the Task domain object. Spec: docs/05-task-runner/01-store-schema.md §Design > JSON Schemas. Version 1.
title: Task
description: A runner task row as returned by the Store API. Three new fields vs the transcript-only v0: dbRowVersion (required), priority (required), transcriptPath (now optional).

id.description: Bare UUIDv4. Runner-emitted tasks use bare UUIDs; transcript-derived tasks use 'session:<id>' or 'agent:<id>' prefixes.

type.description: Task type — determines which executor handles dispatch.

parentTaskId.description: Absent when the task has no parent.

dependsOn.description: TaskId[] — all must be COMPLETE before this task is eligible.

agent.description: Absent for operator-injected tasks with no agent assignment.

dbRowVersion.description: Optimistic concurrency token. Starts at 0 on insert; bumped on every UPDATE. Used by HITL approve/reject for 409 checks (PRD §8.4).

priority.description: Scheduler priority. Higher values are picked first (ORDER BY priority DESC). Default 0.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp — set at createTask() time.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 — set when status transitions to RUNNING.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 — set when status reaches a terminal state.

transcriptPath.description: Absolute path to the source JSONL. Server-internal; never rendered in the UI. Absent for runner-emitted tasks (optional since 05-task-runner/01-store-schema).
